title: rubus minusculus
intro: Rubus minusculus, also known as the dwarf raspberry, is a small perennial shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus minusculus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and wounds.
